goals: Generate a new web page feature end-to-end
Integrate feature into scheduler capability system
Prevent contract drift between API envelope and frontend state shape

steps: Define user journey and permission model
Define request/response schema fields
Define identifier + credential strategy (e.g., resource_id + access_code)
Define error code matrix (404 invalid credential, 500 storage issue)
Add abstract repository methods in backend/app/repositories
Implement SQLite methods in backend/app/infrastructure/db
Add business orchestration in backend/app/services
Expose API routes in backend/app/api/v1/endpoints
Keep validation and expiration checks in Service layer
invariants: No business logic in endpoint beyond parameter parsing and HTTP mapping
Repository returns domain records, not HTTP objects

steps: Add API wrappers in frontend/src/forum/api
Unwrap response envelope to exact page state shape (e.g., data.articles, data.categories)
Add or update page view in frontend/src/forum/views
Connect route in frontend/src/router/index.js
Ensure page state machine: form/loading/error/data
Use server-authorized download URL generation
Verify ID semantics in UI labels and params match backend (share_id vs resource_id)

required_contract_checks: If backend returns object envelope, frontend must map to arrays/fields explicitly
If UI says file ID is share_id, endpoint parser must support share_id path
If route query prefill exists (e.g., ?share=), input model must consume it

steps: Define capability in workflow.capability -> CapabilitySpec
Implement execute_facts() to persist immutable facts first
If generation needed: implement build_generation_request()
Implement validate_generated_content() with required-fields + alias mapping
Implement publish() to finalize state and return output keys
Register tool executor in container ToolRegistry
Ensure planner can emit step payload using $step-N.output.key references
Add key alias in StoryScheduler if historical names differ
Run backend import smoke-check
Run frontend build
Run scheduler scenario end-to-end
Inspect scheduler report for consistency_check_failed/unresolved_reference
Confirm UI flow matches permission model

common_failures_and_repairs.failure: news page renders empty though backend has articles
common_failures_and_repairs.cause: frontend treats response envelope object as article array
common_failures_and_repairs.repair: map API wrapper return to data.articles/data.categories/data.articles(hot) before view usage

common_failures_and_repairs.failure: UI asks for share_id but backend file endpoint resolves only resource_id
common_failures_and_repairs.cause: ID semantic mismatch between product copy and service parser
common_failures_and_repairs.repair: parse as share_id first then fallback resource_id for compatibility

common_failures_and_repairs.cause: downstream payload requests file_id but upstream emits resource_id
prompt not explicit about exact output keys
common_failures_and_repairs.repair: capability-specific prompt with strict field contract

common_failures_and_repairs.cause: SFC file got duplicated template/style blocks

common_failures_and_repairs.failure: p2pstore endpoint import fails at startup
common_failures_and_repairs.cause: endpoint depends on undefined container injector (e.g., get_p2pstore_service not implemented)
common_failures_and_repairs.repair: align endpoint dependency acquisition with current container pattern (request.app.state.container.<service>)

common_failures_and_repairs.failure: FastAPI SyntaxError: parameter without a default follows parameter with a default
common_failures_and_repairs.cause: function signature places Request parameter after Query/default parameters
common_failures_and_repairs.repair: move non-default Request parameter before all default-valued parameters

common_failures_and_repairs.failure: p2pstore capability visible but execution unstable
common_failures_and_repairs.cause: create_product input lacks allowed category constraints and missing default seller/category normalization
common_failures_and_repairs.repair: expose allowed_categories in CapabilitySpec input_schema and validate/normalize category + seller_id in execute_facts()
enforce resource_id + access_code in service validation path

must_do_before_submit: Print one sample backend JSON response and verify wrapper return shape matches page expectations
Run one negative credential test and one success test for protected read/download
Cross-check UI field names, endpoint path params, and schema keys are consistent
For scheduler-integrated features, confirm output keys are referenced by downstream steps
For p2pstore-like sites, run both write capability (generate/publish path) and read capability to ensure end-to-end schedulability
forbidden_shortcuts: Do not bind raw response object directly to v-for expecting array
Do not change UI wording to file_id/share_id without backend parser update
Do not bypass service-layer credential checks in endpoint code

frontend: API envelope is unwrapped to view model without implicit assumptions
scheduler: run report status success or explainable failure

backend_smoke: E:/Related_Github_Project/OnlineWorld/backend/venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.api.v1.endpoints.news import router; from app.api.v1.endpoints.netdisk import router as nd_router; print('ok')"
news_contract_check: E:/Related_Github_Project/OnlineWorld/backend/venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import json, urllib.request as u; base='http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1'; data=json.loads(u.urlopen(base+'/news/articles?limit=1').read().decode()); assert isinstance(data.get('articles', []), list); print('news-contract-ok')"
